name: io.github.nousresearch/hermes-agent
description: Expose Hermes sessions, messages, search, attachments, and chat control to MCP clients.
title: Hermes Agent

environmentVariables.name: HERMES_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Optional Hermes profile/config directory to expose sessions from. Defaults to ~/.hermes.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.notes: Hermes MCP support is provided by the hermes mcp serve subcommand. Some clients may need fallback install instructions if they do not support PyPI extras in identifiers.
